'''Rydonni Prime''' was the only habitable [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Namaryne system]] and home to [[Rythani Products]], headed by the [[K'ntarr family]]. [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Caerbellak]] ruled the planet during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] and the early years of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. It was very wealthy and had very few disenfranchised inhabitants, which made it very loyal to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="AJ9" />

{{Planet-stub}}
